classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

metadata.summary: Elyra provides AI Centric extensions to JupyterLab

documentation: 'The Visual Editor Pipeline extension is used to build AI pipelines from notebooks, Python scripts and R scripts, simplifying the conversion of multiple notebooks or script files into batch jobs or workflows.See https://elyra.readthedocs.io/en/v3.15.0/user_guide/pipelines.html'
